title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · Skill Brief: Security Review
summary: Build a regression suite for a skill and its helper scripts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext security review increment in a skill test and release harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Review skill scripts, dependencies, file scope, and requested permissions.
Unit-test helper scripts and verify safe behavior in temporary fixtures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Security Review evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-security-review-3u4gfa: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Security Review into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-security-review-3u4gfa:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

steps.title: Defend the Security Review model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Security Review applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.
